message:
test(cell): expand from 8 to 92 tests for terminal cell model (wa-66w1x)

Add 84 new tests covering SmallColor conversions, SemanticType defaults
and ordering, CellAttributes bitfield getters/setters (all 11 fields),
foreground/background/underline color management with fat attribute
allocation/deallocation, hyperlink lifecycle, clear, clone_sgr_only
behavior, apply_change for all AttributeChange variants, TeenyString
inline vs heap storage, Cell construction/presentation, UnicodeVersion
idx computation, and white-space utilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
